description: A risk analyst calculates the daily profit and loss (P&L) for a trader's portfolio of physical and financial oil contracts by marking them to the market.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all open positions in the trader's portfolio at the end of the day.

expected_outcome.value: A complete list of all contracts in the portfolio is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Get the official end-of-day settlement prices for all relevant commodities and futures contracts.

expected_outcome.value: The closing market prices are retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Revalue every position in the portfolio using the new market prices and calculate the total daily P&L.

expected_outcome.value: The daily P&L is calculated and reported to management.
